review_text: Great location.  Especially great for those who want to bring their fur babies with them. A great little off leash area for the dogs to go play. Great amenities and the management was fantastic to deal with from the moment we booked. We will definitely be back!

The best place in this caravan park is for does . Nice, green . The amenities are very bad condition.  I have not seen in this condition for very long time
Should be closed for Reno.  Do not go there and price over the roof
Sites big and clean nice pool. Reception great.

We rolled in without a booking and Jo welcomed and delighted us by putting us on the same site we had nearly 3 years ago ( we had forgotten) What a beautiful,  PEACEFUL! little park. The van sites had matting down which was lovely and the grass was nice and soft and green. There is a little fenced area to let your dog have some freedom, great idea. Love this.place, it was an excellent respite in 40°. Yes, they have a pool but we hid inside our van. Highly recommend!

Quiet relaxing little caravan and cabin park. Booked 2 nights but then added a third. Well maintained level powered site with tidy fake grass. The whole park appeared green and lush with pleasant flower/shrub gardens, despite how dry it's been. Great laundry $4 a load with spacious drying lines. I washed all my blankets in addition to all the usual loads. Small but adequate fenced off-leash dog area. Also made use of the dog wash facility. I have a small white non-shedding pup, but heaps of black hair in the tub afterwards. Maybe hair trapped under the false floor, which was too heavy for me to lift and clean.
Short walk to the Murray river with the dog. Just a few mins in the car to the town centre with river boats, a small beach and all the fabulous little shops and eateries. Took a trip on the Canberra paddlesteamer (also dog friendly) and enjoyed live entertainment in the dog friendly beer garden at the Shamrock Hotel.
A great place to stop for a few days.
Loved the off leash dog park

I stayed at the Rich River Caravan Park in early January of 2026.
it was my annual holiday with my wife. Family friends had the site behind us.
I thought long and hard whether to write this review. I think it's important i do so.
I don't want to hang any business out to dry as I know how hard small business is doing it in Victoria ...so as a compromise I will give a 5 star review and an honest review.
Ok....here we go!
1. Upon arrival at my holiday destination I'm super excited. The welcome at reception was appealing. The lady was disinterested! I asked where my site was. She said " Turn left at the end of the road. Didn't receive a park  map...which I thought of later. I asked if the sites were numbered. Her answer was "They should be"
This wasn't the owner by the way. We brought this to their attention later and they apologised
2. Roads are unmade and dusty
3. Had a lovely pool with a brown scum line above the waterline. I have a pool myself and could tell it hadn't been cleaned for a long long time.
I cleaned it myself on Day 3. Yes, that was me if you noticed.
4. The Park is across the road from an Abbatoir. No amount of aftershave will dilute that smell when the wind blows your way.

If you are after an overnight stay with no hassles, it ticks the boxes.
If you are looking for a park as a holiday destination, maybe spend a few more $$$ and look somewhere else.
Sorry, but I think it's only fair to share this information to prospective travellers.
All the best 😊

Really nice campground and well maintained.
Thank you.

I have just left had a great time, Jo was amazing from the time we made the booking until we departed.
We had an ensuite caravan site easy drive through access ensuite was a bit dated but it was clean and well serviced.
The pool was a great relief on a 43 degree day.
I would recommend this park.

We would like to say a big thank you to Richard and Joe for having us and for such a warm welcome at the caravan park. We truly enjoyed our stay — it was pet-friendly, quiet, and wonderfully relaxing, with easygoing and friendly people who made everything feel effortless.

Travelling with our dog and a teenager with a medical condition can sometimes be challenging, but the easy access to everything we needed made our experience stress-free and comfortable. We’re very grateful for the care and atmosphere you’ve created.

Thank you again for making our stay so enjoyable.

Julia & Ric

We have been coming for several years and love staying here, perfect area for bike riding, swimming and fishing, Jo and Richard always make us feel welcome, we have just stayed 3 weeks in an ensuite site and love the fake grass as it is nice to walk on and keeps our van clean, we have already booked out next holiday and are looking forward to it.

Great little quiet caravan park, nice sites adequate amenities, friendly owners.
Nice pet friendly park, we enjoyed our stay.
Comfortable camping, clean facilities

Stayed in an ensuite faux grass site right beside the pool, which I had to myself each day. We had a hedge beside us for privacy and the ensuite other side. Large ensuite with a nice new sink area but the rest is old but great hot water and pressure. Pool definitely could do with repainting or surfacing but it still was great.  Sue was fantastic with our last minute 3 night booking and a pleasure to chat with.  Really dog friendly (make sure you look up the amazing dog leash free park in Moama (6 min away by car) & our schnauzer tried to make it his mission to greet every dog walking past. So why choose here?  Yes, it’s a smaller and older park but I knew we made the right choice after the first night. It’s so quiet!! You definitely wouldn’t get that at staying at the big parks with all the bells. Listening to the birds in the morning and evenings was a pleasure and no hoards of screaming kids.  It’s a 2 min walk down to the river where some were fishing & enjoying the surrounds.  To get into the centre  is literally 2 min by car. Make sure you try the gelato, Augustus Gelato, made traditional way. Amazing choices.  I would definitely recommend and will stay again when next going through the area. Thanks Sue
Great pet friendly spot for our overnight stay driving through to SA. Boy appreciated the pool after a long, hot day in the car

Clean, pristine, friendly accommodation.
We got an ensuite spot which was great with the faux grass which was great as it was clean!
Ensuite is quite big, clean and warm water.
There is a camp kitchen, facilities etc
The only thing I would say is its further from town than we thought i.e. 2km to the pub.
I'm sure that wouldn't bother most people, my husband and I just love to walk to the pub for a beer.
Plenty to do in echuca!

Loved my visit!

Thanks for the great showers and services
What a beautiful holiday park service amazing staff on arrival very welcoming. Rooms absolutely clean and well presented highly recommend this place

A lovely little escape in Echuca, Rich River Tourist Park delivers what many travellers are after: comfort, friendliness, and peace. From the moment you arrive, hosts Jo-Anne & Richard make you feel welcome — genuine hospitality that sets a positive tone for the stay.
Great Caravan Park, lovely couple run it. Neat, quiet, great amenities. Awesome little dog park too. Will definitely camp here again.
Very well kept,  would recommend very quiet, close to the river and town
Been staying there for years now the sites are always clean and well maintained.

Lovey little spot.Great sites but can be a
little tight to get into.

Lovely, clean and quiet. Could imagine it great in warm weather to bring kids. Pool. Games room and great BBQ area. Dog wash was a bonus. We had an ensuite drive through site. Was a real luxury after our days of bush camping.

Stayed in powered  caravan sites. It was very spacious  and clean area. A great enclosed  dog area for my puppies to have a run around.  Park itself  was clean and tidy. The staff were amazing and accommodating with a drive through  site for me. Highly  recommended  this place. I lok forward to coming back

Always a pleasant experience staying here and Rich River tourist Park is our first stop whenever we are in town!
Love it :)
Stayed with MHat short notice. Staff extremely helpful, facilities clean and flat sites, thank u for pleasant stay
Great little park close to town and good value
We will go back to Echuca because of this place. Quiet, perfect for our dog, instructions were timely and very clear.
Jo & Richard were very warm and welcoming and the park was just minutes from the centre of Echuca. All amenities were beautifully clean and we enjoyed our stay very much.

Jo was friendly. Location close to everything. Cabin comfortable, clean and dog friendly. The enclosed, gated, verandah allowed us to have our dog sit out with us. They also have a dog park on the site. Thanks for allowing us to travel with our dog.
This is one of those hidden gems that you don't want to tell people about do you can have it all to yourself. Great location,  great hospitality.
Nice clean small capsize with friendly staff.
Caravan park love it great people and great place
Nice quiet, neat and clean park. Toilets and shower block needs a little maintenance but are clean.
Very friendly hosts & always accommodating with late arrivals (as usually only overnight) etc. Very clean, comfortable cabins & dog friendly.
This caravan park is absolutely lovely. Very clean and perfect for dogs. My pup even had some play dates with other travellers! Close to the river with lots of fantastic walking areas.

Friendly staff. The microwave we were using that failed was promptly replaced. Location was great as it wasn’t near a train station, busy road or anything else that would create a lot of noise at night. It was nice to wake up to the sounds of birds singing.

I recently stayed  at the Rich River Tourist park and found it very clean and quiet with friendly staff. The ensuite amenities at our drive-through site were very clean and spacious. Would stay here again for sure

We had a comfortable and pleasant stay at a powered grass, which had good shade and proximity to amenities. We enjoyed the pool. Amenities were clean but old, needed some updating. Other visitors  were friendly and talkative.  If you catch the wrong wind, the smell from the nearby slaughterhouse can be a nuisance.

Great little Park , well kept & looks like a few more improvements are on the horizon, we had a ensuite site, old but exceptional clean , the astro turf was great, pool and community areas well equipped,fantastic hosts ...our first stay loved it so much we booked for September

A beautiful park with clean amenities and friendly staff.
Would definitely stay again.

We loved our caravan stay, sites were we covered in artificial grass and flat, staff were very friendly, pool was clean,  bbqs were clean. Dog friendly park with enclosed exercise area for our fur babies  to run. Thanks for making our stay great.

Great communication. Easy instructions for late checkin. Immaculately clean cabin. Everything clean and neat as a pin, including the pool.

Owners left the a/c on for us so we walked into a cooled space, which was very thoughtful and appreciated.

Will definitely be returning on our next pass through the area.

A big thank you to the staff at Rich River Caravan Park, we left some belongings in the cabin and they went out of their way to take them to the PO and express post it to our home address. Wonderful service and great friendly staff.
Glenn

We always holiday with our pups, usually we stay in Airbnbs but they're becoming so expensive (and not always so pet friendly)! We were planning a family car camping trip but with 38 degree weather planned we thought we'd book a pet friendly cabin instead of a site, and we are so thrilled we did! Rich River Tourist Park was a real gem, the cabin had everything we needed and was so clean, there's a lovely enclosed green for dogs to have an off lead run and sniff and the park itself was spotless and well maintained. The owners and residents are super friendly and helpful, and the park is just a 3 minute drive to the town centre. Thank you so much 💓 🐾

We had a great stay for the Riveeboat Festival. The park is really clean and easy to access. Van sites are flat and well organised. Staff are super friendly and amenities clean. A shuttle took us in and out of the festival. Thanks!

booked a ensuite site,for our van,and my brothers.well presented ensuite, beutiful pool area, owners more than helpful.price was reasonable, only a couple of minutes from the centre of town.cooking areas (2), are kept clean and tidy.would recomend to anyone.

Lovely, quiet location but close enough to town. Owners were lovely and made us feel welcome during our stay. Owners fixed a faulty TV in our room (on a very hot day) which was very appreciated by us. Will definitely stay again.

I recently stayed at Rich River Tourist Park and had a fantastic experience! The pet-friendly cabin was a highlight—equipped with a great cooking utensils, making it incredibly convenient for preparing meals. The cabin itself was spotless. One of the best features was the veranda with a gate, which kept my dogs safe while we enjoyed the outdoors.

The off-leash dog park was another great plua, with well-maintained amenities and plenty of space for pets to run and play. Plus, the caravan park is within walking distance to the Murray River.

I highly recommend Rich River Tourist Park for anyone looking for a peaceful, pet-friendly getaway with excellent facilities and a prime location!

We have done the lap and I’ve got to say, this is the nicest caravan park we have been to.
Quiet location
Luxury sites - fake turf
Spotless
Friendly staff
Spotless amenities
Good nightly rates
Well done 🙏 highly recommended

Brilliant little park for travellers. Staff are friendly and helpful. We would recommend to everyone but leave us a site to stay. Close to Echuca and the port and a shirt trip across the river to other venue's

Had a powered site. What an awesome park. Clean and tidy, fabulous owners. Amenities are spotless…camp kitchens, pool, off-leash dog area, dog wash, gas refills..
A perfect base for the Moana-Echuca area.

We booked a pet friendly cabin for 2 nights (2 adults and one small dog). The booking was easily made.|On arrival, nice greeting and all was well explained.|The cabin appeared somewhat dated, and in need of some general maintenance. (Several torn flyscreens, decking could be spruced up, trees need to be cut back of steps, etc).|In the cabin, we found some of the crockery not well cleaned from previous visitors. Worse was the microwave which was quite messy inside, to the point that we would not use it. We left a note on the microwave pointing out this aspect.|The oven tray would not fit in the oven!|Lack of bedside lamps; 2 double beds but only one bedside lamp.|Lack of bath mat.|Overall, while we were comfortable, we considered it to be average accomodation.
Great little caravan park .very pet friendly. Lovely and neat.
Enjoyed our stay at Rich River for the 2024 Winter Blues Festival. Good, clean facilities, quiet and only 3km from the fun of the Festival. Will be back!

A lovely caravan park. Nice clean level sites for caravans. Very friendly owners
Really enjoyed our stay

Lovely and quiet caravan park. Pet friendly, has a dog wash and fenced leash free area. Quiet surrounding roads to take pets for walks. Owners are really nice. Great TV reception. Had an ensuite spot, it was functional but cold (it is winter though). Grounds are well kept and clean. Pool clean and sparkling even though it's cold. Two camp kitchens also a games room with pool tables. Short car ride into Echuca or Moama. Lots of interesting towns close under 50km.
All is OK but amenities need up grade, shower very small and old, clean otherwise! and the shops are not close by, but that is good, no tradic noise!
Had a powered site for two nights , very nice staff, quiet park but close to shops .

We chose the ensuite site and are so glad we did as I had kidney stones on our first two nights 😒, so got to appreciate the closeness of the bathroom. Loved the strong shower pressure and it was all so clean and nice (and close).Our little dog was happy to come along as they are pet friendly. All dogs were on a leash. Very friendly people to deal with. We will be back.

Thanks Richard and Jo for yet again providing us with the wonderful experience of staying at your park.|We love the instant turfed sites and the intimacy that a smaller park provides.|Gayle and I always look forward to the perpetual fire that seems to burn 24/7 at the BBQ shelter near Reception. Perfect for those cooler nights.|See you on our next visit.

Great park for couples, also dog friendly. Quiet, no 'big park extras', so probably not as good for families / kids. Easy to find, facilities were good. Artificial grass base was good - clean and newish. Staff were friendly. Will be back next year!
Great park. Great amenities

This is a good park. Probably getting a bit small for the large houses that people drag around these days. Sites are level, amenities clean and tidy, camp kitchen well equipped. Friendly staff. Great value.
Friendly staff, not a bad park at all

Friendly staff, excellent amenities and spacious sites.
Look forward to a return visit.
Thoroughly recommended.

A gorgeous, small, well maintained, independently owned park. Facilities are super clean, prices are very competitive. Amazing, friendly service, fantastic location- get behind then and support the small guys!!
Beautiful spot to relax. Love it 😀
Small park tho roomy. Layed out quite well, bbqs, pool, games room. Even a dog area at end of park.
Nice park..very crowded..long weekend..pool a bit too small and dirty

Great quiet caravan park. Very friendly hosts they were great to communicate with. Clean amenities and grounds with lovely features all around including pretty garden beds. Good half hour walk into town along the river. Ask for a site with shade.

We had a powered van site with enquire.
Friendly service. Clean, peaceful and quiet. The van site was covered with artificial grass and level. Will keep it as a favourite for future stops.

Stayed 2 nights on an ensuite site. Bathroom was great size and clean.
Site size was perfect for our 18ft caravan.
Pool was lovely and never too cold and always partially in shade so prefect for kids.
Bbq was clean. Play room was large with split system to keep us cool while playing table tennis. Very well priced and only about a 40 min  walk if you don't want to drive to the Port.
Safe and very quiet.
Will be back.

Good place to stay with a good pool and comfortable rooms. The only things I suggest to improve on would be to have more car parking space as we had to put our car on the nature strip and I would also add paper towels in the rooms or serviettes, not just tea towels. Maybe also adding Netflix or a DVD player would provide a bit more entertainment in the room. Otherwise, we enjoyed our stay and I'd stay there again.

This little park has become our “go to” home away from home as it is an easy 2.5hr drive from our house. Jo & Richard, the owners are just fantastic and the sites are really generous. We usually have an Ensuite site however this time we had a normal powered site which was fantastic. It was a fake grass site which made it comfortable and usable. There are some permanent residents who are all very friendly and the pool is terrific. This is not a big park, it is small but ideal for couples and their pets.|We can’t wait for our next visit.
A great little dog friendly park, it is clean and tidy with a great pool, and great staff. Jo and Richard run a tight ship, their service is fantastic and we can’t wait to visit again.

This is a gem. Generous sites with synthetic turf which keeps it so clean.  Great pool heated to he right temp.  Some lovely permanent residents which just gives it a nice vibe.  The best part of this gem is the community garden.  What a great initiative and the bloke that tenders it knows everything veggie.  Had a couple of great yarns and picked up some tips for my veggie garden.. had a great stay.
Quite park and  clean amenities
Powered sites are excellent.  The fake grass keeps the sites lovely and clean. Staff excellent.
Great park, we had a powered site. The amenities were spotless. The owners/ managers were lovely, welcoming and very helpful. Location was fantastic, a very short walk to great coffee and food!
Nice park a little distance away, didn't like the smells from sewerage works! Great pool!

Have been going here for well over a decade and it has gotten much better over the last few years. The new management is fantastic at they do.

The pool is now heated, the rooms are cleaner. The sites are flatter and cleaner.

A short walk to the boat ramp for the dog to go swimming. Love this place.
Nice, very quiet park, great powered sites, plenty of room, would definitely recommend this park, and looking forward to staying there again. The lady at the office was very informative and helpful.
Very clean, well-maintained pet friendly park.  We stayed in a 2-bedroom cabin which had everything we needed. A great dog playground, pool etc., etc., Thoroughly enjoyed our stay. Rose & Gary
Very nice park, well looked after, would stay again. Nice Management friendly and welcoming

I can only reiterate all the positive comments about this tourist park. We stayed with our camper trailer on a powered site. The ground was level and the area was astro turfed (excellent idea and well maintained). The toilets, showers and water pressure all top notch, cleaned and serviced regularly. Well looked after gardens, great off lead fenced dog park and only happy satisfied campers around.
Richard and Jo will continue to see us in the future. Location is perfect, quiet and everything Echuca has to offer is close by.
Great little park! Quiet and clean! Will be back!
Very nice. Friendly.

Such a great park so quiet and peaceful
We have been here a number of times
The hosts are very helpful and knowledgeable
Very clean, the camp sites are so green
Beautiful weather
Great undercover BBQ area next to the pool and games room with a fire, it was nice to sit there last night on a nice warm night, it’s just a shame that some guests expectations exceed reality

My wife and I have been coming to this park for a number of years and it's a pleasure to stay at a quiet and friendly park. Jo and Richard take extreme pride in their facilities and it shows. I would highly recommend Rich River as a pace to relax and have a few laughs. Top place and people

Where were told before we arrived that they had a communal fire pit which  when we asked the manager if they were going light it they refused as it was to hot that was his comment what a joke it’s 7:00pm and it’s 14 and a long weekend
Great little caravan park, spotless ensuite, nice flat site and very friendly helpful owners. Our small dog loved it too - would definitely recommend!
Great little park, very tidy great grass sites, good facilities. The camp kitchen with the fire box was great. The pool and games room looked well set up. Friendly hosts Jo and Richard

This caravan park was a find! A last minute booking and we snagged a huge grassy site at this lovely caravan park. The park has a fenced, grassy dog exercise area and a dog wash! |A little way out from town centre, but peaceful and quite close to the river. Perfect for adults and their pooches.

We have just stayed for a couple of nights in our caravan.
It is a great place to stay very warm welcoming staff lovely clean tidy Tourist Park great facilities we will be staying again on our return trips.
Beautiful green park. Great site with our puppies.  Loved everything about it.
Cabin was clean and comfortable and pet friendly also had a little dog park

My wife and I stayed with our motorhome on this current 2023 Kings Birthday weekend.
We found the park to be in excellent condition when considering the flood damage that must have been horrendous to recover from.
Our powered site was very clean and was laid with new synthetic turf which was very nice underfoot...and even nicer to lay on whilst connecting our sullage hoses and bits & pieces.
The amenities were adequate and the perpetual fire from the repurposed LPG bottle which is positioned near the rec. room, was a joy to sit beside in the cold evenings.
Our hosts, Richard and Jo were friendly, helpful and hospitable.
If I had to give feedback, it would be that we found the BBQ hotplate difficult to leave in a good condition for the next user as the cleaning equipment provided was just a scourer and thin wiper. I noted that the person before me was also struggling to leave the hotplate and bench area clean for my own use. A handled scrubber and meatier wipes would be better, as cleaning a hot hotplate with a scourer and thin cloth burns you quite quickly.
Whilst using the BBQ, I purchased zero alcohol beers from the vending machine. The beers were not at all cold and should be vended from a machine that doesn't try to vend both cold beer and twisties. Seems at odds with each others consumption temperatures.
Aside from those couple of minor things, all was great and we'd happily stay there on our next visit.
Thanks guys. A very nice park you keep.

Paul & Gayle
Very quiet
